item.name: afc_auth
GET /auth/verify/<uidb64>/<token>/ — Email-link verification — activates the user account via uidb64+token URL params.
GET /auth/get-user-profile/ — Return full profile + aggregated stats (kills, wins, MVPs, booyahs, tournaments) for the authenticated user.
GET /auth/get-all-news/ — Return all news articles ordered by creation date (newest first).
GET /auth/get-all-roles/ — Return all defined roles (role_id, role_name, description).
GET /auth/get-all-user-and-user-roles/ — Return all users with their assigned roles, status, and last login.
GET /auth/get-admin-history/ — Return all admin action history ordered by timestamp (descending).
GET /auth/get-total-number-of-users/ — Return total user count and count of active (verified) users.
GET /auth/connect-discord/callback/ — OAuth2 callback from Discord; exchanges code for access token, joins guild, saves discord_id to user, then redirects to frontend.
GET /auth/connect-discord/ — Initiate Discord OAuth2 flow for tournament registration; redirects to Discord authorize URL.
GET /auth/connect-discord-account/ — Initiate Discord OAuth2 flow to link Discord account to user profile; session_token passed as query param.
GET /auth/is-discord-account-connected/ — Return whether the authenticated user has a Discord account linked.
GET /auth/get-all-login-history/ — Return all login history records for all users ordered by creation date.
GET /auth/get-notifications/ — Return all notifications for the authenticated user ordered by creation date.
GET /auth/get-total-players-count/ — Return total count of users with role='player'.
GET /auth/get-active-players-count/ — Return count of active players (role='player', status='active').
GET /auth/get-banned-players-count/ — Return count of banned players (role='player', status='banned').
GET /auth/get-new-players-count/ — Return count of new players who joined this calendar month.
GET /auth/get-average-total-kills-per-player/ — Return average kills per player per match for solo, team, and combined.
GET /auth/get-top-mvp-player/ — Return the player with the most MVP awards.
GET /auth/get-top-winner-player/ — Return the player with the most total wins (solo + team combined).
GET /auth/get-admin-activities/ — Return the latest 100 admin activity log entries ordered by timestamp.
afc_tournament_and_scrims
GET /events/get-all-events/ — List all published (non-draft) events.
GET /events/get-all-events-paginated/ — List published events with limit/offset pagination.
GET /events/get-all-tournaments-and-scrims/ — List all published events (minimal fields: id, name, date, status).
GET /events/get-all-tournaments-and-scrims-paginated/ — List all published events with pagination (minimal fields).
GET /events/get-all-tournaments-and-scrims-separated/ — List all published events separated into tournaments and scrims arrays.
GET /events/get-all-tournaments-and-scrims-separated-paginated/ — List published events separated into tournaments/scrims with pagination.
GET /events/get-total-events-count/ — Return the total count of all events (including drafts).
GET /events/get-total-tournaments-count/ — Return count of published tournament-type events.
GET /events/get-total-scrims-count/ — Return count of published scrim-type events.
GET /events/get-upcoming-events-count/ — Return count of published events with status 'upcoming'.
GET /events/get-ongoing-events-count/ — Return count of published events with status 'ongoing'.
GET /events/get-completed-events-count/ — Return count of published events with status 'completed'.
GET /events/get-average-participants-per-event/ — Return average max_teams_or_players across all events.
GET /events/get-most-popular-event-format/ — Return the most frequently used event format.
GET /events/get-stage-role-assignment-progress/ — Get the current Discord role assignment progress for a stage.
GET /events/get-all-leaderboards/ — Get all leaderboards for a given event.
GET /events/get-drafted-events/ — List all draft events (requires authentication).
GET /events/get-my-drafted-events/ — List draft events created by the authenticated user.
GET /events/get-total-kills/ — Return aggregate total kills across all solo and team matches.
GET /events/get-all-tournament-player-match-stats/ — Return all TournamentPlayerMatchStats records.
GET /events/get-all-sponsors/ — List all users with the sponsor_admin role.
GET /events/total-members-this-month/ — Return the count of new user registrations this calendar month.
GET /events/total-team-this-month/ — Return the count of new teams created this calendar month.
GET /events/total-active-tournaments/ — Return count of tournaments that are currently active (started but not ended).
GET /events/total-published-news/ — Return the total count of news articles.
GET /events/export-participants/ — Export event participant list as a CSV or XLSX file download.
afc_team
GET /team/view-join-requests/ — List all pending join requests for the team owned by the authenticated user.
GET /team/get-all-teams/ — Return a list of all teams with basic info (no auth required).
GET /team/get-team-details-based-on-invite/<str:invite_id>/ — Return public team details for a given invite ID without requiring login.
GET /team/get-number-of-teams/ — Return the total number of teams (no auth required).
GET /team/get-total-teams-count/ — Return total count of all teams (admin dashboard stat).
GET /team/get-current-active-teams-count/ — Return count of teams that are not banned.
GET /team/get-banned-teams-count/ — Return count of banned teams.
GET /team/get-new-teams-count/ — Return count of teams created in the last 7 days.
GET /team/get-average-members-per-team/ — Return average number of members per team.
GET /team/get-team-with-highest-wins/ — Return the team with the most placement-1 finishes across all tournament matches.
GET /team/get-top-earning-teams/ — Return the top 5 teams sorted by total_earnings descending.
GET /team/admin-search-players/ — Admin: search users by username or email (requires admin/head_admin/teams_admin role); returns up to 10 matches with current team.
GET /team/admin-get-team-event-history/ — Admin: paginated list of events a team has participated in (requires admin/moderator/support role).
afc_awards
GET /awards/categories/view/ — List all award categories with their section names.
GET /awards/nominees/view/ — List all nominees with their linked categories.
GET /awards/category-nominee/all/ — Return all sections with their categories and each category's nominees (full tree).
GET /awards/sections/all/ — List all sections (id and name only).
GET /awards/get-total-votes-cast/ — Return the total number of votes cast across all categories.
GET /awards/get-total-voters/ — Return the count of distinct users who have cast at least one vote.
GET /awards/get-votes-per-category/ — Return vote counts grouped by category, sorted descending.
GET /awards/get-votes-per-nominee/ — Return vote percentage per nominee across all categories.
GET /awards/get-votes-per-section/ — Return vote counts grouped by section, sorted descending.
GET /awards/get-voting-timeline/ — Return daily vote counts over time (votes grouped by date).
GET /awards/get-total-votes-per-nominee-per-category/ — Return vote counts broken down by nominee within each category.
afc_shop
GET /shop/view-all-products/ — List all products with their variants (admin only).
GET /shop/view-current-stock-status/ — List stock levels and availability for all product variants (admin only).
GET /shop/view-all-orders/ — List all orders (up to 500) with line items (admin only).
GET /shop/orders-today/ — List all orders placed today (admin only).
GET /shop/orders-this-week/ — List all orders placed in the current week (admin only).
GET /shop/orders-this-month/ — List all orders placed in the current month (admin only).
GET /shop/view-all-coupons/ — List all coupons with metadata and validity status (admin only).
GET /shop/view-product-details/ — Get details of a single product (auth commented out — public endpoint).
GET /shop/get-my-cart/ — Retrieve the authenticated user's current cart contents and subtotal.
GET /shop/get-my-orders/ — List all orders belonging to the authenticated user.
GET /shop/get-order-details/ — Get full details of a specific order owned by the authenticated user.
GET /shop/get-order-details-for-admin/ — Get full order details including customer PII and transaction IDs (admin role required).

GET /shop/get-coupon-conversion-rate/ — Return conversion rate (paid orders using coupon / total orders since coupon creation). NOTE: view expects a 'slug' path param but the registered URL has none — the view will error at runtime unless the URL is updated.
GET /shop/get-all-fulfillments/ — List all fulfillment records including provider payloads (any authenticated user, but exposes sensitive voucher data — effectively admin use).
GET /shop/test-denom/ — Dev/debug endpoint: fetch denominations for brand_id 113 from Mintroute (no auth, no restrictions).
GET /shop/test-brands/ — Dev/debug endpoint: fetch brands for country_id 2 from Mintroute (no auth, no restrictions).
afc_player
GET /player/get-all-players/ — Return all users with aggregated stats (kills, wins, MVPs, ban status, team name).
afc_player_market
GET /player-market/get-recruitment-posts/ — List all recruitment posts (both TEAM_RECRUITMENT and PLAYER_AVAILABLE), no auth required
GET /player-market/view-team-recruitment-posts/ — List all TEAM_RECRUITMENT posts with roles, countries, and expiry
GET /player-market/view-player-availability-posts/ — List all PLAYER_AVAILABLE posts with roles, country, and availability type
GET /player-market/view-applications/ — Team owner views all applications to their team's recruitment post, including player stats
GET /player-market/view-my-applications/ — Authenticated player views all of their own applications with status and stats
GET /player-market/application-details/ — Get full detail of a single application (player, team, post, stats, chat_id); accessible by player or team staff
GET /player-market/trial-chat/messages/ — Fetch all messages in a trial chat (accessible by player or team owner/manager/coach)
GET /player-market/trial-chats/ — List all trial chats the authenticated user is a participant in (as player or team staff)
GET /player-market/my-trial-invites/ — Player views all direct trial invites they have received from teams
GET /player-market/admin/all-trials-and-applications/ — Admin/moderator views all applications system-wide with optional status, team_id, and player_id filters
GET /player-market/post-details/ — Public: fetch full detail of a single recruitment post by post_id
GET /player-market/my-posts/ — Authenticated user views all recruitment posts they created
GET /player-market/view-applications/ — Duplicate URL registration in urls.py (same view_applications handler); behaves identically to the first /player-market/view-applications/ entry
afc_ocr
GET /events/ocr-sessions/ — List all OCR sessions (admin only), optionally filtered by match_id. Returns up to 100 most recent.
afc_rankings
GET /rankings/teams/monthly/ — List team rankings for a given month (paginated); ?month=YYYY-MM, defaults to latest populated month.
GET /rankings/teams/quarterly/ — List team quarterly rankings for a season (publish-gated); ?season_id= optional.
GET /rankings/teams/annual/ — List annual team leaderboard entries for a year; ?year= defaults to current year.
GET /rankings/teams/<int:team_id>/score/ — Get a single team's monthly + quarterly score breakdown.
GET /rankings/players/monthly/ — List player monthly rankings; ?month=YYYY-MM, defaults to latest populated month.
GET /rankings/players/quarterly/ — List player quarterly rankings for a season (publish-gated); ?season_id= optional.
GET /rankings/players/annual/ — List annual player leaderboard entries for a year; ?year= defaults to current year.
GET /rankings/players/<int:player_id>/score/ — Get a single player's monthly + quarterly score breakdown.
GET /rankings/seasons/ — GET: public paginated list of all seasons. POST: create a new season (head_admin only).
GET /rankings/seasons/current/ — Return the currently active season (is_active=True), or null.
GET /rankings/seasons/<int:season_id>/transfer-log/ — Paginated list of a season's transfer-window change history (ranking admins, read-only).
GET /rankings/admin/audit-log/ — Filtered, paginated audit log of all ranking admin writes (read-only, ranking admins).
GET /rankings/admin/teams/<int:team_id>/raw/ — Recompute and return the raw component breakdown behind a team's current-quarter score (read-only, ranking admins).
GET /rankings/admin/players/<int:player_id>/raw/ — Recompute and return the raw component breakdown behind a player's current-quarter score (read-only, ranking admins).
GET /rankings/ghost-teams/ — GET: paginated list of ghost teams with filters. POST: create a new ghost team with roster (ranking admins).
GET /rankings/scoring-config/defaults/ — Return the constants.py factory-default scoring rules snapshot (ranking admins, read-only).
GET /rankings/scoring-config/ — GET: active scoring config + version history. POST: draft and activate a new scoring config version (ranking admins).
GET /rankings/event-tier-rules/ — GET: list tier rules ordered by priority. POST: create a new tier rule (ranking admins).
GET /rankings/admin/tournament-prizes/ — List prize payouts (newest first) with optional ?season_id filter (prize admins, read-only).
GET /rankings/admin/results/markers/ — List a season's tournaments with their counting-control state and active exclusion counts (ranking admins, read-only).
GET /rankings/event-counting/<int:event_id>/ — GET: counting control state for one event. PATCH: set count_winner/count_placement/count_kills toggles (ranking admins).
GET /rankings/result-exclusions/ — GET: list result exclusions (filter by ?event_id or ?season_id). POST: create a result exclusion for one team or player (ranking admins).
GET /rankings/admin/seasons/<int:season_id>/social/ — List all teams with their social media snapshot for a season (ranking admins, read-only).
GET /rankings/admin/recalc-status/ — Best-effort recalc and evaluation status for a season (read-only, ranking admins).
GET /rankings/admin/teams/quarterly/ — Ungated admin draft preview of team quarterly scores including unpublished tiers (ranking admins).
GET /rankings/admin/players/quarterly/ — Ungated admin draft preview of player quarterly scores including unpublished tiers (ranking admins).
afc_organizers
GET /organizers/admin/get-all-organizations/ — Paginated oversight list of every organization; filterable by ?status= and ?search=.
GET /organizers/admin/get-organization/<slug:slug>/ — Full oversight detail for one org including all members (with permissions), events, and reports placeholder.
GET /organizers/get-my-organizations/ — List every organization the current user is an active member of, with their role and effective permissions per org (the org-switcher feed).
GET /organizers/get-organization/<slug:slug>/ — Return the full profile of one org plus the caller's effective permissions. Active members only; non-members receive 403.
GET /organizers/get-organization-members/<slug:slug>/ — List active members of one org (owner + sub_organizers) with roles and effective permission maps. Any active member may read.
GET /organizers/design-requests/<slug:slug>/ — POST: submit a leaderboard design request (gated by can_submit_designs); GET: list the org's own design requests (any active member).
GET /organizers/admin/design-requests/ — AFC-staff triage queue of design requests across every org; filterable by ?status= and ?organization_id=, paginated.
GET /organizers/events/<int:event_id>/rating/ — Return an event's public rating aggregate (average + count). Auth optional: includes my_score when a valid Bearer token is present.
GET /organizers/event-comments/<int:event_id>/ — Return de-identified comments (text + created_at only) for an event. Gated by org_can_event(can_view_reviews); organizer/AFC admin only.
GET /organizers/metrics/<slug:slug>/ — Aggregate performance metrics for one org: event count, registered teams/players, total kills, average rating. Gated by can_view_metrics.
GET /organizers/admin/reports/ — AFC-staff triage list of every organization report; filterable by ?status= and ?organization_id=, paginated newest-first.

GET /organizers/get-organization-public/<slug:slug>/ — Public (unauthenticated) org profile page: branding, socials, and list of published (non-draft) events. Only active orgs are exposed; suspended/deleted return 404.
afc_partner_api
GET /api/v1/partner/events/ — Paginated list of published events visible to the authenticated partner (gated by can_read_events toggle); supports ?limit and ?offset.
GET /api/v1/partner/events/<slug:event_slug>/ — Single event detail card for a partner-visible event by slug (gated by can_read_events); returns 404 if event is out of scope.
GET /api/v1/partner/events/<slug:event_slug>/stages/ — Paginated stages of an event with groups nested inside each stage (gated by can_read_stages); 404 if event out of scope.
GET /api/v1/partner/events/<slug:event_slug>/matches/ — Paginated matches of an event with room credentials stripped by the serializer firewall (gated by can_read_matches); 404 if event out of scope.

GET /api/v1/partner/events/<slug:event_slug>/standings/ — Paginated ranked final standings for an event (gated by can_read_standings); rows are pre-ranked in memory then paged; 404 if event out of scope.
GET /api/v1/partner/events/<slug:event_slug>/teams/ — Paginated tournament teams of an event with per-event aggregated toggled stats (gated by can_read_teams); 404 if event out of scope.

GET /api/v1/partner/events/<slug:event_slug>/players/ — Paginated players who recorded stats in an event, each with per-event (not lifetime) toggled stats scoped to their tournament team (gated by can_read_players); 404 if event out of scope.
GET /partners/admin/list/ — Paginated oversight list of all partners with active-key counts; supports ?status= (active/suspended) and ?search= (name or slug); requires partner-admin role.

GET /partners/admin/<slug:slug>/ — GET returns full partner config (all 14 toggles, scope id-lists, key metadata); PATCH does whitelist-validated partial update of toggles and scope fields; requires partner-admin role.
